data.hyperedge_name: <hyperedge>"If death occurs by suicide within 2 years of issue or reinstatement, we pay only premiums paid minus withdrawals."
<hyperedge>"The Money Market sub-account has a guaranteed minimum rate of 1.5% but other sub-accounts have no guaranteed minimum return."
<hyperedge>"You may change allocations at any time by written request or through our online portal. No fee for first 12 changes per year; $25 fee thereafter."
<hyperedge>"Reduces death benefit dollar-for-dollar"
<hyperedge>"1.1 'Sub-Account' means a segregated investment account that invests in shares of a designated mutual fund."
<hyperedge>"OPTION I - Level Death Benefit: Death Benefit = Face Amount; Lower charges but no growth from investments"
<hyperedge>"Processing fee: $50"
<hyperedge>"POLICY LOANS: • Maximum: 90% of surrender value • Interest Rate"
<hyperedge>"Death while serving in military conflict in a war zone is excluded if it occurs within 24 months of issue."
<hyperedge>"Policy Number: PIL-VUL-2024-5521"
<hyperedge>"Minimum: $1,000"
<hyperedge>"Primary: Michael Thomas Foster (Spouse) - 100%"
<hyperedge>"PREMIUM LOAD: 5.0% of each premium payment"
<hyperedge>"Loan amounts are moved to the Money Market sub-account"
<hyperedge>"OPTION II - Variable Death Benefit (CURRENTLY SELECTED): Death Benefit = Face Amount + Account Value; Higher charges but death benefit grows with account"
<hyperedge>"Surrender charges may apply (see Section 3.6)"
<hyperedge>"VARIABLE UNIVERSAL LIFE INSURANCE POLICY Pinnacle Investment Life Corp."
<hyperedge>"Death Benefit Option: Option II (Face + Account Value)"
<hyperedge>"Death resulting from operating an aircraft as pilot or crew member is excluded unless declared and approved with extra premium."
<hyperedge>"Maximum: 90% of surrender value"
<hyperedge>"MORTALITY & EXPENSE RISK CHARGE: 0.90% per annum of account value, deducted daily"
<hyperedge>"1.4 'Mortality and Expense Risk Charge' (M&E) is a daily charge of 0.90% annually to cover insurance risks and administrative costs."
<hyperedge>"Planned Annual Premium: $12,000"
<hyperedge>"You may switch between options subject to: • Proof of insurability for increases • Minimum face amount requirements • $50 administrative fee"
<hyperedge>"Reduces face amount proportionally"
<hyperedge>"Interest Rate: 5.5% per annum (fixed)"
<hyperedge>"This policy is issued in connection with Pinnacle Investment Life Separate Account A, a registered unit investment trust."
<hyperedge>"ADMINISTRATIVE CHARGE: $15 per month"
<hyperedge>"2.4 You may change allocations at any time by written request or through our online portal. No fee for first 12 changes per year; $25 fee thereafter."
<hyperedge>"IMPORTANT: The account value and death benefit (under Option II) are NOT guaranteed and will fluctuate based on sub-account performance."
<hyperedge>"If account value is insufficient to cover monthly deductions for 61 consecutive days, the policy will lapse."
<hyperedge>"1.2 'Unit Value' means the value of one unit of a sub-account, calculated daily based on fund performance."
<hyperedge>"Policy Date: April 5, 2024"
<hyperedge>"The prospectus for the Separate Account and underlying funds must be read carefully before investing."
<hyperedge>"COST OF INSURANCE: Monthly charge based on: (Face Amount at Risk) × (Monthly COI Rate) / 1,000; Face Amount at Risk = Death Benefit - Account Value"
<hyperedge>"2.3 Current Allocation: Equity Growth Fund: 40% Balanced Allocation Fund: 30% Government Bond Fund: 20% Money Market Fund: 10%"
<hyperedge>"Investment risk is borne entirely by the policy owner."
<hyperedge>"Lapse notice will be sent at least 30 days before lapse."
<hyperedge>"Initial Face Amount: $1,000,000"
<hyperedge>"This is a securities product subject to SEC regulation."
<hyperedge>"2.1 Premium payments (after premium load) are allocated to sub-accounts based on your investment instructions."
<hyperedge>"FUND EXPENSES: Each sub-account has its own expense ratio ranging from 0.45% to 1.25% annually (detailed in prospectus)"

<hyperedge>"2.2 Available Sub-Accounts: • Equity Growth Fund • Balanced Allocation Fund • Government Bond Fund • International Equity Fund • Money Market Fund (guaranteed minimum 1.5%) • Real Estate Securities Fund"
<hyperedge>"Poor investment performance can cause the policy to lapse if account value becomes insufficient to cover charges."
<hyperedge>"Reinstatement within 3 years requires: Evidence of insurability, Payment of all back charges plus 6% interest, Repayment of outstanding loans"
<hyperedge>"Secondary: Foster Children's Trust - 100%"
<hyperedge>"Pinnacle Investment Life Corp. New York, New York ____________________________ April 5, 2024 President & CEO"
<hyperedge>"1.3 'Accumulation Units' means units held in sub-accounts before any distributions."
<hyperedge>"SURRENDER CHARGE SCHEDULE (% of premium paid): Year 1-2: 7% | Year 3-4: 5% | Year 5-6: 3% | Year 7+: 0%"
<hyperedge>"Maximum: Account value minus $5,000"
<hyperedge>"Name: Dr. Amanda Katherine Foster"
